title: Perfectly Fast
description: Only mods made to boost your performance
body:
This modpack has mods made for **optimization** and **performance**. The combination of these mods are letting Vanilla Minecraft run smoothly even on weak computers with stable frames per seconds. 
[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) is also included to let you use shaders.

![A world running with 240fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a05b1f6dd86bfc0bc2ba7c3a2d949a4daae27c4.png)
